2605.04711.title: Budget-aware Auto Optimizer Configurator
2605.04711.paper_summary: Optimizer states occupy massive GPU memory in large-scale model training. However, gradients in different network blocks exhibit distinct behaviors, such as varying directional stability and scale anisotropy, implying that expensive optimizer states are not universally necessary and using a global optimizer is often memory-inefficient. We propose the Budget-Aware Optimizer Configurator (BAOC) to reduce memory cost by assigning suitable optimizer configurations to individual blocks under given budgets. Specifically, BAOC samples gradient streams to derive statistical metrics that quantify the potential performance risk of applying cheaper configurations (e.g., low precision or removing momentum). It then solves a constrained allocation problem to minimize total risk under memory and time budgets, selecting a budget-feasible configuration for each block. Experiments across vision, language, and diffusion workloads demonstrate that BAOC maintains training quality while significantly reducing the memory usage of optimizer states. The code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/BAOC-45C6.
2605.04711.paper_summary_zh: 優化器狀態在大規模模型訓練中佔用了大量的 GPU 記憶體。<lb/>然而，不同網路區塊中的梯度顯示出不同的行為，例如方向穩定性和尺度各向異性的變化，這意味著昂貴的優化器狀態並不是普遍必要的，使用全局優化器往往會導致記憶體效率低下。<lb/>我們提出了預算感知優化器配置器（BAOC），通過在給定預算下為各個區塊分配合適的優化器配置來降低記憶體成本。<lb/>具體而言，BAOC 取樣梯度流以導出統計指標，量化應用更便宜配置（例如，低精度或去除動量）的潛在性能風險。<lb/>然後，它解決一個受限分配問題，以在記憶體和時間預算下最小化總風險，為每個區塊選擇一個符合預算的配置。<lb/>在視覺、語言和擴散工作負載上的實驗表明，BAOC 在顯著降低優化器狀態的記憶體使用量的同時，保持了訓練質量。<lb/>代碼可在 https://anonymous.4open.science/r/BAOC-45C6 獲得。
2605.04711.author: Kang Liu et.al.
2605.04711.authors: Kang Liu, Wei Peng, Jianchen Hu
